scripts.build:local: bun run _clean && bun run _scripts:local && bun run _assets:local && bun run _sdk:copy
scripts.build:prod: bun run _clean && bun run _scripts:prod && bun run _assets:prod
scripts._assets:local: cp manifest.local.json dist/manifest.json && cp src/popup.html dist/popup.html && cp src/rules.json dist/rules.json
scripts._assets:prod: cp manifest.prod.json dist/manifest.json && cp src/popup.html dist/popup.html && cp src/rules.json dist/rules.json
scripts.package: bun run build:local && bun run zip
scripts.package:prod: bun run build:prod && bun run zip:prod
